description: R3 mutation gate PINNED to infra/exec/grantverify.py (the Ed25519-DSSE grant verifier, P2-T01) — score must stay >= 0.90 (SV-3 spine)
rules: TARGET + TEST_CMD are baked into the signed core (a standing enforcement surface, not caller-chosen)
passes iff the slice kills >= THRESHOLD (default 0.90) of single-token mutants of the grant verifier
PROJECT_DIR (the repo root) flows from the task-ledger; the engine sandboxes a copy
usage: Set PROJECT_DIR (repo root); optional THRESHOLD, MAX_MUTANTS. Output: mutate.json.
limitation: Guards the grant-VERIFY crypto. The kernel enforcement of the grant (exod) is Linux-only + unbuilt.
